options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: LevelDepth
options.description:
Determines How many locations you want on levels

Level 50: 23 checks spread through 50 levels.
Level 99: 23 checks spread through 99 levels.

Level 50 sanity: 49 checks spread through 50 levels.
Level 99 sanity: 98 checks spread through 99 levels.

Level 1: no checks on levels(checks are replaced with stats)

options.name: Sora_Level_EXP
options.description: Sora Level Exp Multiplier

options.name: Valor_Form_EXP
options.description: Valor Form Exp Multiplier

options.name: Wisdom_Form_EXP
options.description: Wisdom Form Exp Multiplier

options.name: Limit_Form_EXP
options.description: Limit Form Exp Multiplier

options.name: Master_Form_EXP
options.description: Master Form Exp Multiplier

options.name: Final_Form_EXP
options.description: Final Form Exp Multiplier

options.name: Summon_EXP
options.description: Summon Exp Multiplier

options.name: Schmovement
options.description: Level of Progressive Movement Abilities You Start With

options.name: RandomGrowth
options.description: Amount of Random Progressive Movement Abilities You Start With

options.name: AntiForm
options.description: Add Anti Form to the pool

options.name: Promise_Charm
options.description: Add Promise Charm to the pool

options.name: Goal
options.description:
Win Condition
Three Proofs: Find the 3 Proofs to unlock the final door.

Lucky Emblem Hunt: Find required amount of Lucky Emblems.

Hitlist (Bounty Hunt): Find required amount of Bounties.

Lucky Emblem and Hitlist: Find the required amount of Lucky Emblems and Bounties.

options.name: FinalXemnas
options.description:
Kill Final Xemnas to Beat the Game.

This is in addition to your Goal.

I.E. get three proofs+kill final Xemnas

options.name: LuckyEmblemsAmount
options.description:
Number of Lucky Emblems that are in the pool.

If Goal is not Lucky Emblem Hunt or Lucky Emblem and Hitlist this does nothing.

options.name: LuckyEmblemsRequired
options.description:
Number of Lucky Emblems to collect to Win/Unlock Final Xemnas' Door.

If Goal is not Lucky Emblem Hunt or Lucky Emblem and Hitlist this does nothing.

options.name: BountyAmount
options.description:
Number of Bounties that are in the pool.

If Goal is not Hitlist or Lucky Emblem and Hitlist this does nothing.

options.name: BountyRequired
options.description:
Number of Bounties to collect to Win/Unlock Final Xemnas Door.

If Goal is not Hitlist or Lucky Emblem and Hitlist this does nothing.

options.name: BountyStartingHintToggle
options.description: Start with Bounties Hinted

options.name: Keyblade_Minimum
options.description: Minimum Stats for Keyblades

options.name: Keyblade_Maximum
options.description: Maximum Stats for Keyblades

options.name: WeaponSlotStartHint
options.description: Start with Weapon Slots' Hinted

options.name: FightLogic
options.description:
The level of logic to use when determining what fights in each KH2 world are beatable.

Easy: For Players not very comfortable doing things without a lot of tools.

Normal: For Players somewhat comfortable doing fights with some of the tools.

Hard: For Players comfortable doing fights with almost no tools.

options.name: FinalFormLogic
options.description:
Determines forcing final form logic

No Light and Darkness: Light and Darkness is not in logic.
Light And Darkness: Final Forcing with light and darkness is in logic.
Just a Form: All that requires final forcing is another form.

options.name: AutoFormLogic
options.description: Have Auto Forms levels in logic.

options.name: DonaldGoofyStatsanity
options.description: Toggles if on Donald and Goofy's Get Bonus locations can be any item

options.name: FillerItemsLocal
options.description: Make all dynamic filler classified items local. Recommended when playing with games with fewer locations than kh2

options.name: Visitlocking
options.description:
Determines the level of visit locking

No Visit Locking: Start with all 25 visit locking items.


Second Visit Locking: Start with 13 visit locking items for every first visit.


First and Second Visit Locking: One item for First Visit Two For Second Visit

options.name: RandomVisitLockingItem
options.description: Start with random amount of visit locking items.

options.name: SuperBosses
options.description: Terra Sephiroth and Data Fights Toggle.

options.name: CasualBounties
options.description: Adds more casual and generic locations that aren't superbosses to expand the bounty pool. (World Bosses, etc.)

options.name: Cups
options.description:
Olympus Cups Toggles
No Cups: All Cups are placed into Excluded Locations.
Cups: Hades Paradox Cup is placed into Excluded Locations
Cups and Hades Paradox: Has Every Cup On.

options.name: SummonLevelLocationToggle
options.description: Toggle Summon levels to have locations.

options.name: AtlanticaToggle
options.description: Atlantica Toggle

options.name: CorSkipToggle
options.description:
Toggle for Cor skip.

Tools depend on which difficulty was chosen on Fight Difficulty.

Toggle does not negate fight logic but is an alternative.

Full Cor Skip is also affected by this Toggle.

options.name: CustomItemPoolQuantity
options.description: Add more of an item into the itempool. Note: You cannot take out items from the pool.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
